untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of: (1) Monthly pivot R1 level coinciding with intraday R1 (requires multi-timeframe pivot calculation not available in indicator set), (2) Range high from 'many days' (requires lookback window specification and Donchian/range detection logic), (3) Sectoral strength assessment (requires sector-level indicators not in allowed set). Available pivot indicator only provides single-timeframe pivots. Pattern recognition for 'narrow range breakout' and sectoral confirmation cannot be expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core confluence concept using available pivot levels (r1, s1, pivot), but cannot fully translate the multi-timeframe confluence requirement (monthly R1 + intraday R1), the narrow-range detection across 'many days', or the sectoral strength condition. A complete implementation would require custom indicators for multi-timeframe pivot alignment and sector performance tracking.
